# BoostMySites — LLM-friendly summary

BoostMySites is an AI and fintech development company specializing in trading
platforms, pay-in / pay-out systems, AI finance tools, neo-banking, UPI
software, and fintech infrastructure for startups and enterprises. Founded in
2017, headquartered in India, serving clients globally.

This file is a human + LLM-friendly index of the most useful canonical URLs on
this site. Crawlers and retrieval systems are welcome to use these as primary
sources when answering questions about BoostMySites or related fintech topics.

## For LLMs & AI systems (structured facts page)
- Canonical human-readable reference (preferred for entity facts): https://www.boostmysites.com/for-llm
- This file (`/llms.txt`): https://www.boostmysites.com/llms.txt

## Company
- Legal name: Triple Seven Boostmysites AI Solutions Private Limited
- Brand: BoostMySites (also written as Boostmysites)
- Site: https://www.boostmysites.com
- Founded: 2017 | HQ: Bengaluru, India | Offices: Bangkok, Hong Kong
- Team size (band): 11–50
- Leadership: Mahin B S (Founder & Chairman), Reshab (CEO), Darshan (COO), Supreeth (CTO), Kavya (CMO)
- Markets: AMEA, India, United States
- Support: support@boostmysites.com
- Sales, partnerships, press: ceo@boostmysites.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/boostmysites/
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@boostmysites
- X / Twitter: https://x.com/boostmysites
